title: BeigeConfig
description: Beige configuration file (config.json5). JSON5 format — comments and trailing commas are allowed.

providers.description: Named LLM providers. Each key becomes a provider name agents can reference.

apiKey.description: API key. Use "${VAR_NAME}" to read from environment. Not required for local providers (e.g. Ollama).

baseUrl.description: Custom API endpoint URL. Required for non-built-in providers (ZAI, Groq, Ollama, etc.).

api.description: API protocol. Auto-set for built-in providers (anthropic, openai, google). Required for custom providers.

maxConcurrency.description: Maximum concurrent requests to this provider. Requests that exceed this limit queue and await until a slot frees. Default: 3 if not specified.

plugins.description: Plugin registry. Each key becomes the plugin name. Plugins can provide tools, channels, hooks, and skills.

path.description: Path to the plugin package directory. Resolved relative to the config file unless absolute.

config.description: Arbitrary config object passed to createPlugin(config, ctx) at startup

_source.description: Install source (e.g. 'npm:@scope/package'). Written by 'beige plugins install', used by 'beige plugins update'. Do not edit manually.

skills.description: Skill registry. Each key becomes the skill name used in agent configs.

path.description: Path to the skill package directory. Resolved relative to the config file unless absolute.

agents.description: Agent definitions. Each agent gets its own Docker sandbox, Unix socket, and LLM session.

provider.description: Provider name — must match a key in llm.providers

model.description: Model ID as the provider expects it

thinkingLevel.description: Extended thinking budget. Only affects models that support it.

compactionThreshold.description: Context token count at which auto-compaction triggers for this model. Must be less than the model's context window. When set, compaction kicks in earlier than the default (contextWindow − 16384 tokens). Example: set to 100000 on a 200k-window model to compact at 100k tokens.

fallbackModels.description: Fallback models tried in order when the primary model fails or is rate-limited

provider.description: Provider name — must match a key in llm.providers

model.description: Model ID as the provider expects it

thinkingLevel.description: Extended thinking budget. Only affects models that support it.

compactionThreshold.description: Context token count at which auto-compaction triggers for this model. Must be less than the model's context window. When set, compaction kicks in earlier than the default (contextWindow − 16384 tokens). Example: set to 100000 on a 200k-window model to compact at 100k tokens.

tools.description: Tool names registered by plugins that this agent can invoke

skills.description: Skill names (from skills registry or plugin-registered) mounted into this agent's sandbox

workspaceDir.description: Absolute or relative path (to config file) for the agent's workspace. Defaults to ~/.beige/agents/<agentName>/workspace/. Mounted at /workspace in sandbox.

memoryLimit.description: Container memory limit (e.g. "3g", "512m"). Default: "3g". Prevents runaway processes (heavy npm installs, build tools) from taking down the host. The container will hit a cgroup OOM and be killed rather than exhausting host RAM.

extraMounts.description: Additional host→container bind mounts. Reduces isolation — use carefully.

extraEnv.description: Environment variables passed to the container. Visible to the agent — never use for secrets.

pluginConfigs.description: Per-agent plugin config overrides. Keys must reference plugins in the plugins registry. Values are deep-merged with the top-level plugin config from config.plugins.<name>.config.

log.description: Log rotation settings applied to gateway.log (on startup) and audit.jsonl (on each write).

maxSizeBytes.description: Rotate a log file when it exceeds this size in bytes. Default: 10485760 (10 MB).

maxFiles.description: Number of rotated log files to keep (.1 … .N). Oldest is deleted when the limit is reached. Default: 5.
